title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
summary_full: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.
summary_public: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.
